title: Concrete Foundations
description: Concrete foundations for sheds, summer houses, greenhouses, garages, extensions and new builds. We dig, form and pour to the correct depth and specification — giving you a solid, level base that lasts for decades.

title: External Property Restoration
description: Repainting rendered and brick properties, repointing old and deteriorating brickwork, and restoring the exterior of your home to its best condition. We transform tired, weathered exteriors — refreshing the paintwork, re-rendering where needed, and repointing mortar joints.

title: Landscaping
description: Hard and soft landscaping that transforms outdoor spaces. Block paving, sandstone and porcelain patios, sleeper raised beds, steps, retaining walls and planting schemes — designed and built to last with proper groundworks foundations.

title: Garden Renovation
description: Complete garden renovations from start to finish. We clear, level, drain and reshape your outdoor space — then rebuild it exactly how you want it with new turf, paving, planting, fencing and garden structures.
